name: Blue Buck Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (cornmeal, buckwheat flour, salt, and baking powder) in one bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, soy milk, vegetable oil, and blueberries.
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Heat a griddle or large skillet over medium heat and lightly grease with cooking spray.
5. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each cake.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface, then flip once using a spatula.
7. Continue cooking until both sides are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Serve hot with your favorite sweetener, such as honey or maple syrup.
